info.name: Diraschool API - Full Endpoint Collection
info.description: Generated from current API routes. Use Login requests first to set activeToken.

exec: const j=pm.response.json(); if (j.user && j.user._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('userId', j.user._id);
const j=pm.response.json(); if (j.school && j.school._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('schoolId', j.school._id);
const j=pm.response.json(); if (j.class && j.class._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('classId', j.class._id);
const j=pm.response.json(); if (j.student && j.student._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('studentId', j.student._id);
const j=pm.response.json(); if (j.subject && j.subject._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('subjectId', j.subject._id);
const j=pm.response.json(); if (j.exam && j.exam._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('examId', j.exam._id);
const j=pm.response.json(); if (j.results && j.results[0] && j.results[0]._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('resultId', j.results[0]._id);
const j=pm.response.json(); if (j.payment && j.payment._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('paymentId', j.payment._id);

const j=pm.response.json(); if (j.reportCard && j.reportCard._id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('reportCardId', j.reportCard._id); if (j.reportCard.subjects && j.reportCard.subjects[0]) pm.collectionVariables.set('reportCardSubjectId', j.reportCard.subjects[0].subjectId || ''); }
const j=pm.response.json(); if (j.holiday && j.holiday._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('holidayId', j.holiday._id);
const j=pm.response.json(); if (j.timetable && j.timetable._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('timetableId', j.timetable._id);
const j=pm.response.json(); if (j.book && j.book._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('bookId', j.book._id);
const j=pm.response.json(); if (j.loan && j.loan._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('loanId', j.loan._id);
const j=pm.response.json(); if (j.route && j.route._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('routeId', j.route._id);
